LSE-HS9-L4-1400P-HSSCIPHY-BWC-LAT-02 • HS Science: Physical Science • Thermal Energy and Energy Conversion • Build-a-World Challenge • Latinx / Latin American Experiences

The Pot That Cooks Itself

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the girl trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about what the girl is working through, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what she says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what she is trying to decide.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  NGSS HS-PS3-3  |  HS Physical Science Grades 9–10: Thermal Energy and Energy Conversion
